title: sim pass assertion failure on unflattened design with unused port

features.name: unconnected submodule output port
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where an output port is left unconnected (dangling), creating a null reference during simulation

features.name: multi-bit output port left floating
features.description: Code should include a submodule output port of multi-bit wire type (8-bit) that is not connected to anything

features.name: sim pass on unflattened hierarchical design
features.description: Code should include a simulation pass running on an unflattened design where submodule hierarchy is preserved
features.snippet:
read_verilog -sv check.v
prep -top check
sim -d -clock clk -reset rst -rstlen 1 -n 1 -w check
